## Testing Checklist
- [ ] Opened the page in a browser and verified visually
- [ ] All new interactive elements work as expected
- [ ] Disabled elements visually appear disabled
- [ ] All new elements have `data-testid`, `aria-label`, and `role` attributes where needed
- [ ] No existing test cases are broken by this change
- [ ] CI checks pass (HTML validate, JS lint)

## Playwright / Selenium Compatibility
- [ ] New elements can be located by `getByRole()` or `getByTestId()`
- [ ] New form inputs have proper `aria-label` for `getByLabel()`
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works (Tab, Enter, Escape where applicable)
